productDisplayName: Lotto Men Dynamo Yellow Casual Shoes
description: canvas shoes are the most versatile pair of footwear that one can ever own. and there's no better style than the lotto Dynamo. Pair thos canvas shoe with denims or corduroys and look equally glamorous with each combination. The fabric upper keeps your feet fresh all day, while the patterned outsole provides superior grip on any terrain.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability MidsoleFoam insole in Italian Sport Design for high energy return and cushioningRemovable heavily cushioned footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Herringbone grooves on the midfoot and circular lugs on the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and tractionPivot points at the forefoot and foreheel region for flexible movementshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
